'''Synthtech Medtech Corporation''' was a company that specialized in the production of medical equipment. Medical scanners such as the [[MDS-50]] and [[Containment unit|irradiation boxes]] were among the equipment produced by Synthtech Medtech. The equipment was specialized for use in military operations.

{{Company-stub}}
